# PrivateHealthInsurance.co.nz

> NZ's independent private health insurance comparison service. Compare Southern Cross, nib, AIA and Partners Life. Free expert advice from licensed NZ financial advisers. No obligation, no cost.

## About This Site

PrivateHealthInsurance.co.nz is operated by Cover4You Group, a licensed financial advice service based in New Zealand. We help New Zealanders compare and understand private health insurance options from all major providers.

Our licensed advisers hold current Financial Services Provider (FSP) registration with the Financial Markets Authority (FMA) and are members of the Financial Services Complaints Limited (FSCL) dispute resolution scheme.

## Coverage Types

- [Hospital & Surgical](/coverage/hospital-surgical/)
- [Comprehensive Health](/coverage/comprehensive-health/)
- [Cancer Care](/coverage/cancer-care/)
- [Specialist & Diagnostics](/coverage/specialist-diagnostics/)
- [Day-to-Day Cover](/coverage/day-to-day-cover/)
- [Income Protection](/coverage/income-protection/)
- [Business Health](/coverage/business-health/)
- [Life Insurance](/coverage/life-insurance/)

- [AIA New Zealand](/health-insurance/aia/)
